subcodes.first_line: O thou who art young in years, O Badíʻ! Rejoice, for thou art mentioned by the Creator [Badíʻ] of the heavens and the earth, Who appeared with a Revelation that hath shaken the foundation
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صغیر السن یا بدیع ان افرح بما یذکرک بدیع السموات و الارض الذی اتی بامر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @eulogies; reminiscences, @power of the Manifestation of God
